text: Artificial intelligence is transforming many parts of our lives, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias, which can occur when AI systems learn from data that contains unfair human prejudices. This can lead to decisions that are not fair for certain groups of people. To ensure fairness, developers must carefully check their data and algorithms. Another key issue is privacy, as AI often relies on personal information that needs to be protected. Transparency is also crucial—people should understand how AI makes decisions that affect them. This is why responsible AI development focuses on creating technology that is safe, honest, and respectful of human rights.
